name: paintoutlet-ai-backend
description: Express MVC backend for AI-powered social post scheduling with Neon.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cp=require('child_process');const walk=(d)=>fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{const full=path.join(d,entry.name);return entry.isDirectory()?walk(full):[full];});const files=walk('src').filter((f)=>f.endsWith('.js'));for(const file of files){const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',file],{stdio:'inherit'});if(result.status!==0){process.exit(result.status||1);}}console.log('Syntax check passed for '+files.length+' files.');"
